name: Mauritius Mass Finder
release_name: Share UX Refactor + Bottom Band Stability Fix
update_message_en: A new version of Mauritius Mass Finder is available.
update_message_fr: Une nouvelle version de Trouver une Messe à Maurice est disponible.
notes: Share UX release: replaces the ambiguous icon-only header Share control with a clear top-right menu, preserves result-card sharing, keeps the bottom navigation stability fix, and leaves the database unchanged.
